description: Hollywood for men from playboy is inspired by the glamorous home of American filmstars and is an oriental woody fragrance. Top notes are are mandarin and bergamot, along with aromatic accords of thyme and elemi. The heart consists of calming lavender with jasmine, rosewood and cedar with a base of vetiver, musk, amber, vanilla and sandalwood.Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
